info.title: ChillClaw Daemon API
info.description: Current daemon HTTP surface derived from `apps/daemon/src/routes/*` and shared TypeScript contracts in `packages/contracts`. This documents the current response shapes and route-specific wrappers, not an aspirational future API.

tags.name: System
tags.description: Daemon status, install, recovery, diagnostics, and app lifecycle routes.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Model configuration, auth, default selection, and local runtime routes.

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Guided setup state machine and first-run workflow routes.

tags.name: Channels
tags.description: Channel account configuration and interactive setup session routes.

tags.name: Skills
tags.description: Installed skill catalog and marketplace routes.

tags.name: Plugins
tags.description: Managed plugin configuration and lifecycle routes.

tags.name: Chat
tags.description: Chat thread overview, history, send, and abort routes.

tags.name: AI Team
tags.description: AI team overview plus currently unsupported mutation routes.

get.description: HTTP requests receive 426. The real transport is a WebSocket upgrade on the same path that streams `ChillClawEvent` payloads.

parameters.name: targetId
parameters.description: Deployment target identifier. Current handlers only accept `standard` or `managed-local`.

get.description: This route is currently stubbed and intentionally returns HTTP 501 from the daemon.

InternalServerError.description: Unhandled daemon error. The current server wraps thrown handler errors as `{ error: string }` with HTTP 500.

UpgradeRequired.description: Plain HTTP is not supported on this route. Upgrade to a WebSocket connection.

NotFoundError.description: The requested resource or action was not found.

UnsupportedOperation.description: The route exists but currently returns a deliberate 501 response.

FreshRead.name: fresh
FreshRead.description: When set to `1`, invalidates selected daemon read caches before resolving the request.

MarketplaceSearchQuery.name: q
MarketplaceSearchQuery.description: Marketplace search text. Empty input currently falls back to the server search default.
